examples: He moped into the schoolyard wishing she were a boy, and imagining how he would trounce her if she were.
Now, I'll show you how to trounce your husband.
His rise underscores how Goldman has been able to trounce many of its peers.
Polls suggest that she would trounce Mrs Duhalde, by as much as 42% to 14%.
Children in Asia and Europe often trounce their American counterparts in standardised scholastic tests.
